§6Chlorine Gas§f

§aCorrosive, toxic gas from the Combination Oven — essential for PVC, HPS, phosgene, and chemical weapons!§f

Chlorine Gas is a corrosive, toxic gas produced by processing certain minerals and compounds in the §bCombination Oven§f and §bElectrolysis Machine§f. It is a critical ingredient in the production of §bPVC§f, §bHigh-Performance Solvent§f, §bPhosgene§f, and various chemical weapons.

§6Production§f:
§b• Combination Oven§f (primary):
  §b–§f Chlorocalcite → §e250mB§f Chlorine Gas + Calcium Powder.
  §b–§f Molysite → §e250mB§f Chlorine Gas + Iron Ingot.
  §b–§f Sodalite → §e100mB§f Chlorine Gas + Sodium.
  §b–§f Glowstone Dust → §e100mB§f Chlorine Gas + Sulfur.
§b• Electrolysis Machine§f:
  §b–§f Potassiumchloride Solution (§e250mB§f) → §e125mB§f Chlorine Gas + Dust.
  §b–§f Calciumchloride Solution (§e250mB§f) → §e125mB§f Chlorine Gas + §e125mB§f Calcium Solution.

§6Uses§f:
§b• PVC Bar§f (Chemical Plant): §e250mB§f + §e250mB§f Unsaturated Hydrocarbons + Cadmium Powder → §e2×§f PVC.
§b• High-Performance Solvent§f (Industrial Mixer): §e250mB§f + §e750mB§f Reformate Gas → §e1,000mB§f HPS.
§b• Phosgene§f (Industrial Mixer): §e500mB§f + §e500mB§f Unsaturated Hydrocarbons → §e1,000mB§f Phosgene.
§b• Mustard Gas§f (Industrial Mixer): §e250mB§f + §e750mB§f Reformate Gas + Sulfur → §e1,000mB§f.
§b• Chlorinated Petroleum Wax§f (Ore Acidizer): §e100-250mB§f + Oil Tar/Paraffin Wax → Chlorinated Wax.
§b• Artillery Shells§f: §e4,000mB§f per 16" chlorine gas shell.

§eTip§f: The Combination Oven route via §bChlorocalcite§f is the most efficient — §e250mB§f per operation with just Calcium Powder as byproduct. Stockpile Chlorine Gas whenever you run your Combination Oven, as it feeds into multiple mid-game production chains!
